channel.title: Funny on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Funny on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: When x approaches 5
item.description:
I recieved it in a mail from one of my friends. Found this pic worth sharing :D

Comments

Comment by Aman…. on 2009-08-18 22:44:01 +0530

Aman….

Comment by Preetinder on 2009-08-18 23:47:42 +0530

Mera naam kyn ni likheya mail main bheji c…

Comment by Shibani on 2009-08-19 12:32:51 +0530

Excellent…this is how it should’ve actually been…I would’ve fared better in Calculus 🙂

Comment by Sidhu on 2009-08-20 20:18:34 +0530

item.title: Quote modified for S/W industry
item.description:
Got this in a forward mail. Good one.

Forgiving or punishing the terrorists is left to God. But, fixing their appointment with God is our responsibility - Indian Army

Updated statement for this in S/W INDUSTRY…

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

.

Forgiving or punishing the Developer is left to Manager. But, fixing their appointment with Manager is our responsibility -   Tester

We all knew that…

but this one is  for the finishing touch!!!

Damn good.

item.title: Men first...
item.description:
Well, heard enough about various women cells. There are Men cells too ;) Just see one below

Sidhu

Comments

Comment by RollerCoaster on 2007-07-01 12:03:00 +0530

HAHAHHAHAHAHAAHHA

LOL cant stop laughing…..

Comment by Neeraj Bhatia on 2007-07-19 21:45:00 +0530

Where do you get this picture? Have you taken it or you have copied it from some pic-source?
